---
title: "H3K27ac"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

Welcome to my research website.

[H3K27ac QC Checks](https://johndhurley.github.io/CrossSpecies_CM_Diff_H3K27ac/QC_Checks.html)

[H3K27ac PCA](https://johndhurley.github.io/CrossSpecies_CM_Diff_H3K27ac/H3K27ac_PCA.html)

[H3K27ac DGE](https://johndhurley.github.io/CrossSpecies_CM_Diff_H3K27ac/H3K27ac_DGE.html)
